title: A CS Professor on Why Slow Learning Wins in the AI Era | CU Boulder, Tom Yeh
summary: Tom Yeh argues that teaching AI fundamentals by hand at human speed, grounded in mathematical foundations, is more durable than chasing the latest tools. He contends that this approach protects learners from hype cycles and that understanding AI deeply requires people to shape AI rather than AI shaping people.
